## 🌟 Overview

<img align="right" width="280" src="https://i.imgur.com/dBaSKWF.gif" alt="Music Bot Banner"/>

> **Xbitcode Music Bot** is a powerful, production-ready Telegram music bot that streams high-quality **audio & video** directly in your Telegram groups — with **zero cookies**, **minimal errors**, and **blazing-fast performance**.

Built for **developers**, **music bot owners**, and **teams** who need a reliable, scalable solution for Telegram music streaming.

<br clear="right"/>

---

## ✨ Features

<div align="center">

| 🎵 Feature | 🔎 Description |
|:---:|:---|
| 🎧 **Audio & Video Streaming** | High-quality playback in Telegram voice chats |
| 🚫 **Cookie-Free** | No cookies required — always stable & clean |
| ⚡ **Error-Free Playback** | Robust API with smart fallback handling |
| 🔑 **API Key Access** | Secure per-key authentication |
| 📈 **Flexible Rate Limits** | Plans for every scale — from free to enterprise |
| 🌐 **Multi-Language Support** | Python, Node.js, C++ & more |
| 🔒 **Verified Safe & Updated** | Repo is regularly audited and kept up to date |

</div>

---

## 🚀 Deploy Options

### ☁️ One-Click Deploy on Heroku

<div align="center">

<br/>

[![Deploy on Heroku](https://img.shields.io/badge/🚀%20Deploy%20on%20Heroku-430098?style=for-the-badge&logo=heroku&logoColor=white)](https://dashboard.heroku.com/new?template=https://github.com/xbitcode/music)

<br/>

> Click the button above to deploy instantly on Heroku — no setup required.

</div>

---

### 🖥️ Local / VPS Deployment

> 📋 First, grab your required variables from [`sample.env`](https://github.com/xbitcode/music/blob/main/sample.env)  
> 📚 Full guide: [Local/VPS Documentation](https://stranger-organization.gitbook.io/stranger-music-docs/local-vps-deploy)

```bash
# 📥 Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/xbitcode/music && cd music

# 🔄 Update system packages
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get upgrade -y

# 🎬 Install ffmpeg
sudo apt-get install ffmpeg -y

# ⚡ Install uv (Python package manager)
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
source $HOME/.local/bin/env

# 📦 Create virtual environment and install dependencies
uv venv && uv sync

# ⚙️ Set up your environment variables
cp sample.env .env
vi .env
```

> 💡 **Tip:** Press `I` to edit in vim, fill in your variables, then press `Esc` and type `:wq` to save.

```bash
# 🖥️ Install tmux to keep the bot alive after closing terminal
sudo apt install tmux && tmux

# ▶️ Start the bot
bash start
```

> 💡 **Tip:** To detach from tmux — Press `Ctrl+b` then `d`
